CIT.notes: Standard CIT 22%; petroleum companies 78% (incl special tax); financial institutions 27%; hydropower resource rent tax 67.7%

VAT.notes: Standard 25%; food/drink 15%; passenger transport/cinema/hotel/public broadcasting 12%; zero-rated exports

IIT.notes: Base income tax 22%; bracket surcharges up to 16.6% on high income; effective top marginal ~47.4%; self-employed social insurance 11.1%
